contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 44
- Description: Fix slow TDG holdings badge — dao_totals cache probe-key bug
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/379
  
  Details:
  AI agent (Deep Seek) execution: diagnosed and fixed the ~27s 'Loading your TDG holdings...' delay on dapp.truesight.me.
  
  Root cause: dao_members_cache_publisher (GAS) probed assetVerify using contributors[0], but contributors are name-sorted and the alphabetical first (@_H4N5) has an empty public_keys[]. So probeKey was null -> dao_totals null -> dapp/tdg_balance.js could never serve the TDG badge from cache and fell back to the slow assetVerify &full=true call (measured 27.5s) on every page load for every user.
  
  What changed:
  - DaoMembersCache.js: scan for the first contributor that actually has a public key, use that as the assetVerify probe key.
  - Deployed to the live GAS project (clasp push + version 30 + redeploy of the pinned webhook deployment AKfycbxv...).
  - Triggered a forced cache refresh via the documented secret-safe path (Sophia ProxyJump bastion -> Edgar box -> on-box .env curl); dao_members.json now ships dao_totals populated (asset_per_circulated_voting_right: 0.00671).
  
  Result: TDG badge now resolves from the GitHub CDN cache in ~50-150ms instead of ~27s, on every DApp page.
  
  Pull requests:
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/379
- Contributor(s): Deep Seek
- TDG Issued: 73.33
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
